summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON | Charge Stand is not properly displayed in "Software" tab if it is currently unplugged
scenario: Charge Stand name and image incorrectly change to placeholder in Device Settings > Software tab when unplugged from power
description_clean: When a Charge Stand is unplugged from power, it is not properly displayed in the Device Settings > Software tab. The name changes to match the headset name and the image is replaced with a placeholder. After plugging the Charge Stand back in, the page refreshes and shows the correct information. Expected: Charge Stand should be properly displayed in Device Settings > Software even when it is not plugged into power.
steps: Tap on the connected headset to open Device Settings
Unplug the Charge Stand from power
Observe the Charge Stand display in the Software tab
Plug the Charge Stand back into power
Observe the Charge Stand display in the Software tab
expected: Charge Stand should be properly displayed in Device Settings > Software tab with its correct name and image, even when it is not plugged into power.
actual: When the Charge Stand is unplugged from power, its name changes to match the headset name and its image is replaced with a placeholder. After plugging the Charge Stand back in, the page refreshes and shows the correct information.
